MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-25-2014 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS FELICISIMO LIMON AND ELAINE LIMON'S MOTION FOR STIPULATED CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE. BASED ON THE DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND THE CONTENTS OF THE SEALED ENVELOPE, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/28/14 IS CONTINUED TO 8/18/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. THE COURT RETURNED THE CONTENTS SEALED IN AN ENVELOPE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND THERE WAS NO OBJECTION BY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
